nasb.text: You have seen many things, but you do not observe them; Your ears are open, but none hears.

esv.text: He sees many things, but does not observe them; his ears are open, but he does not hear.

cnv.text: 你們看見了許多的事，卻沒有留心， 耳朵開著，卻沒有聽見。

ccb.text: 你们看见许多事却不领会， 耳朵开着却听不见。”

csbs.text: 你们看见许多事，却没有留意； 耳朵开着，却没有听见。”
